title: Radiator Airer 5 Bars – Over Door Clothes Airer 2Pack Adjustable Folding Radiator Drying Rack for Towels & Laundry, Space Saving Cloth Drying Rack for Radiators, Doors & Baths
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗲 𝗥𝗮𝗱𝗶𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗿 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗹𝗹 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗲𝘀:This radiator airer rack is perfect for drying laundry on radiators, doors, and baths. Designed as a cloth drying rack, it easily fits over most surfaces and is ideal for everyday home drying needs.

𝗙𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗛𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗕𝗮𝗿𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗘𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗗𝗿𝘆𝗶𝗻𝗴: Featuring 5 strong bars, this towel rail radiator drying rack offers ample space to dry towels, clothes, and delicates. Ideal as a clothes dryer rack, it’s great for indoor drying all year round.

𝗔𝗱𝗷𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗔𝗿𝗺𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗙𝗶𝘁: Equipped with adjustable arms, this radiator towel rail and dryer rack easily adapts to fit various radiator and door sizes. It’s the smart solution for both small and large laundry loads.

𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗲 𝗦𝗮𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗥𝗮𝗱𝗶𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿 𝗖𝗹𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀 𝗗𝗿𝘆𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗥𝗮𝗰𝗸: Our radiator clothes drying rack folds flat for compact storage. Whether you use it as an over radiator towel rail or an over door clothes airer, this space-saving design helps you maximize every inch of your home.

𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗮𝗰𝘁 & 𝗣𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻: With an open size of approx. 52 x 33 x 15cm, this radiator drying rack is lightweight, durable, and easy to move. It’s the ideal over door airer and radiator airer for quick laundry drying.
